economic_notes: Crane Cove Seafoods Limited Partnership (99.99% share) generated $11,614,108 profit in 2022. Eskasoni Tobacco Shop, Eskasoni Gaming Centre, Eskasoni Gaming Commission, Eskasoni Recreation Centre, Sarah Denny Cultural Centre, Eskasoni Fitness Centre, Eskasoni Communications, Eskasoni Leasing Corporation are band-operated enterprises. Eskasoni Supermarket Limited excluded from consolidation due to inability to obtain adequate financial information.
notes: Audit opinion is QUALIFIED due to Eskasoni Supermarket Limited being excluded from consolidation — management recorded it on modified equity basis but could not provide adequate financial information to support the balances. Auditors signed December 11, 2023 for March 31, 2022 fiscal year (18-month delay). Annual surplus of $25,232,396 includes $11,614,108 from Crane Cove Seafoods Limited Partnership. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Crane Cove Seafoods Limited Partnership and incorporated business enterprises ($557,254). Deferred revenue is very large at $27,255,528. Infrastructure Canada funding of $3,992,536 received in 2022 versus $2,206,596 in 2021. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + MKN + FNIHB + METS + CMHC + DFO + Infrastructure Canada + Province of Nova Scotia.
